title: Identify next Suco optimizer candidates
description: Investigation task: identify four Suco Home Improvement scores with recent feedback items and no recent optimizer procedure runs, excluding the four scores already launched in this session. Record selection criteria and recommended candidates.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started candidate search. Criteria: Suco Home Improvement scorecard; has recent feedback items; exclude scores already launched this session; avoid scores with recent optimizer procedure runs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed candidate scan for Suco - Home Improvement. Excluded scores with recent optimizer procedures: Blind Transfer- AI, Annual Income AI, Project Intent AI, Reason Call - Bathroom AI, Project Type AI, and Inappropriate Conversations- AI. Recommended next optimizer candidates based on 30-day feedback and no recent optimizer run: Proper Questioning- AI, Misleading AI, Appropriate Rebuttal- AI, and DNC SA - AI v2.0. Strong alternates: Early Transfer AI, Income and Name Alignment Metadata AI, Address/Project Timeline/Credit Rating Metadata AI.
